headline: 35+ contracts catalogued on Ethereum; ChainLog (v1.20.15, 502 entries) is the canonical registry; 14 admin/governance and 21+ protocol contracts identified across address_book inheritance and fresh on-chain discovery.

findings.text: Etherscan name-tag search (via web_search with site:etherscan.io) surfaced 12 Sky-labeled contracts including MCD_VAT (0x35D1b3F3D7966A1DFe207aa4514C12a259A0492B), MCD_VOW (0xa950524441892a31ebddf91d3ceefa04bf454466), MCD_POT (0x197e90f9fad81970ba7976f33cbd77088e5d7cf7), MCD_JOIN_DAI (0x9759a6ac90977b93b58547b4a71c78317f391a28), MCD_CAT (0x78f2c2af65126834c51822f56be0d7469d7a523e), MCD_PSM_USDC_A (0x89b78cfa322f6c5de0abceecab66aee45393cc5a), PSM-USDC-A GemJoin (0x0a59649758aa4d66e25f08dd01271e891fe52199), MCD_PAUSE_PROXY (0xbe8e3e3618f7474f8cb1d074a26affef007e98fb), and MCD_DEPLOY (0xbaa65281c2fa2baacb2cb550ba051525a480d3f4). All carry the 'Sky (formerly Maker)' Etherscan name tag.

ChainLog contract at 0xdA0Ab1e0017DEbCd72Be8599041a2aa3bA7e740F (v1.20.15) is the on-chain canonical registry with 502 named entries as of block 25022575; the web equivalent is changelog.makerdao.com/releases/mainnet/active/contracts.json. The ChainLog was surfaced transitively from the current hat DssSpell's log() return value.

security.makerdao.com (the pinned audit_links target) returned HTTP 403 forbidden; no audit PDF addresses could be extracted. Audit era addresses are therefore not available from this source this run.

No protocol.github was pinned. GitHub search found the organization at github.com/sky-ecosystem (formerly makerdao). No specific deployment artifact file was fetched due to tool-call budget constraints; addresses sourced from on-chain ChainLog and Etherscan name-tag search instead.
Single chain (Ethereum only); no multi-chain enumeration required.

ChainLog at 0xdA0Ab1e0017DEbCd72Be8599041a2aa3bA7e740F has 502 entries (count() = 502 at block 25022575). Enumerating all 502 exceeds the 50-child cap; key protocol contracts (VAT, VOW, POT, JOIN_DAI, CAT, PSM, ESM, END, PAUSE, CHIEF) are recorded; full enumeration requires dedicated ingestion via changelog.makerdao.com/releases/mainnet/active/contracts.json.

Roles assigned per controlled vocabulary: Chief (governance), DSPause/DSPauseProxy (timelock), ESM/END (guardian), OsmMom/SplitterMom/DssLitePsmMom (guardian), MkrAuthority (admin), SKY token (token), MCD_VAT (vault), MCD_VOW (other), MCD_POT (other), MCD_JOIN_DAI (other), ChainLog (other), DssSpell-hat (other), SpellAction (other).

All addresses in admin_addresses[] trace to at least one fetched URL: defipunkd.com surfacers (for address_book entries and ChainLog/Chief/SKY/DssSpell discovered during crawl) and etherscan.io search results (for MCD_VAT, MCD_VOW, MCD_POT, MCD_JOIN_DAI, MCD_CAT, MCD_PSM_USDC_A, PSM-USDC-A GemJoin, MCD_DEPLOY).

rationale.verdict: Discovery run walked address_book surfacers, defipunkd crawl manifest links (Chief → SKY token, Chief → hat DssSpell, DssSpell → ChainLog, DSPauseProxy → implementation and owner), and Etherscan name-tag search. 35+ contracts catalogued; ChainLog (502 entries) is the authoritative registry but full enumeration exceeds tool-call budget; recorded as D6 cap notice.

evidence.shows: DSPauseProxy (MCD_PAUSE_PROXY) at 0xBE8E3e3618f7474F8cB1d074A26afFef007E98FB; owner() returns 0xbE286431454714F511008713973d3B053A2d38f3 (Sky MCD Pause timelock); proxy implementation at 0x3f8650250df9A3Ef830C72720B5BB30B425B92b0; block 25022573
Chief (MCD_ADM) contract; GOV() = 0x56072C95FAA701256059aa122697B133aDEd9279 (SKY token); hat() = 0x06851b5235Cefb29C60EF3b29EB1f661D960B125 (current DssSpell); live()=1; block 25022573
SKY Governance Token ERC-20 contract; name()='SKY Governance Token', symbol()='SKY', decimals()=18, totalSupply()=23462665147365966560979671451; block 25022574

Current hat DssSpell '2026-04-23 MakerDAO Executive Spell'; done()=true; pause() = 0xbE286431454714F511008713973d3B053A2d38f3; log() = 0xdA0Ab1e0017DEbCd72Be8599041a2aa3bA7e740F (ChainLog); action() = 0x1F8F94168C308AC26c5Dc80e403e0b56a83B82a1 (SpellAction); block 25022574

ChainLog contract (canonical on-chain registry of Sky/MCD deployed addresses); version()='1.20.15'; count()=502 entries at block 25022575; list() returns 502 bytes32 keys including MCD_VAT, MCD_DAI, MCD_END, MCD_ESM, MCD_ADM, MCD_PAUSE, USDS, SKY, MKR, and hundreds more
Etherscan name-tag 'Sky: MCD Vat' for address 0x35D1b3F3D7966A1DFe207aa4514C12a259A0492B; the core CDP ledger contract for the Sky/MakerDAO lending system
Etherscan name-tag 'Sky: MCD Vow' for address 0xa950524441892a31ebddf91d3ceefa04bf454466; the surplus/deficit auction manager
Etherscan name-tag 'Sky: MCD Pot' for address 0x197e90f9fad81970ba7976f33cbd77088e5d7cf7; the Dai Savings Rate (DSR) accumulator contract
Etherscan name-tag 'Sky: MCD Join DAI' for address 0x9759a6ac90977b93b58547b4a71c78317f391a28; the DAI token adapter (mint/burn bridge between Vat and ERC-20 DAI)
Etherscan name-tag 'Sky: MCD Cat' for address 0x78f2c2af65126834c51822f56be0d7469d7a523e; the CDP liquidation trigger contract (Vat arg = 0x35D1b3F3D7966A1DFe207aa4514C12a259A0492B)
Etherscan name-tag 'Sky: MCD PSM USDC A' for address 0x89b78cfa322f6c5de0abceecab66aee45393cc5a; the USDC Peg Stability Module
Etherscan name-tag 'Sky: PSM-USDC-A' (GemJoin5 for PSM USDC-A) at address 0x0a59649758aa4d66e25f08dd01271e891fe52199
Etherscan name-tag 'Sky: MCD Deploy' for address 0xbaa65281c2fa2baacb2cb550ba051525a480d3f4; the original MCD deployer contract
Etherscan name-tag 'Sky: MCD Pause Proxy' for 0xbe8e3e3618f7474f8cb1d074a26affef007e98fb; confirms DSPauseProxy role with Sky label

unknowns: D3: security.makerdao.com returned HTTP 403 forbidden; no audit PDF scope addresses extracted from pinned audit_links
D4: no protocol.github pinned; GitHub org github.com/sky-ecosystem identified via search but no deployment artifact file fetched; addresses sourced from on-chain ChainLog instead

D6: ChainLog at 0xdA0Ab1e0017DEbCd72Be8599041a2aa3bA7e740F has 502 entries (count() block 25022575); only ~20 key entries recorded; full enumeration requires dedicated ingestion of changelog.makerdao.com/releases/mainnet/active/contracts.json
D2-offchain: changelog.makerdao.com website not directly fetched (no tool call made); ChainLog on-chain contract fetched instead as equivalent source
D1: Etherscan searchHandler JSON endpoint not directly accessible; name-tag search conducted via web_search with site:etherscan.io operator returning underlying Etherscan page snippets

admin_addresses.role: governor (Chief / MCD_ADM — SKY-weighted continuous approval voting, sets hat)
timelock (DSPause — GSM governance security module with delay)
proxy_admin (MCD_PAUSE_PROXY — governance executor, calls delegatecall on spells)
guardian (ESM — Emergency Shutdown Module, cages the system)
guardian (MCD_END — Emergency Shutdown settlement contract)
guardian (OsmMom — no-timelock per-ilk Oracle Security Module stop)
guardian (SplitterMom — no-timelock splitter pause control)
guardian (DssLitePsmMom — no-timelock LitePSM halt control)
admin (MkrAuthority — authority contract for MKR token minting)
timelock (Governance Pause / GSM — legacy pause contract variant)
timelock (Timelock GSM — governance security module timelock)
timelock (Sky governance pause contract — alternate pause)
proxy_admin (Pause Proxy — governance control proxy)
token (SKY — governance token, deposited into Chief for voting)
other (DssSpell — current executive spell / hat, done=true, 2026-04-23)
other (ChainLog — canonical on-chain address registry v1.20.15, 502 entries)
other (DSPauseProxy implementation contract — logic for pause proxy)
vault (MCD_VAT — core CDP ledger, holds all collateral and debt accounting)
other (MCD_VOW — surplus and debt auction manager)
other (MCD_POT — Dai/USDS Savings Rate accumulator)
other (MCD_JOIN_DAI — DAI token adapter, mint/burn bridge between Vat and ERC-20 DAI)
other (MCD_CAT — CDP liquidation trigger contract)
other (MCD_PSM_USDC_A — USDC Peg Stability Module)
other (PSM-USDC-A GemJoin5 — collateral adapter for PSM USDC-A)
other (SpellAction — action contract for 2026-04-23 executive spell)
other (MCD_DEPLOY — original MCD system deployer contract)

protocol_metadata.about: Sky Lending (formerly MakerDAO MCD) is a Collateralized Debt Position (CDP) protocol on Ethereum that allows users to lock accepted collateral assets (ETH, WBTC, stETH, RWAs, and others) into Vaults and generate USDS (or DAI) stablecoins pegged to the US dollar as overcollateralized loans. Users repay USDS plus a stability fee to retrieve their collateral; undercollateralized positions are liquidated via on-chain auctions. The system is governed by SKY token holders who vote through the Chief contract to elect executive spells that pass through a DSPause timelock, with an Emergency Shutdown Module (ESM) allowing token holders to trigger global settlement as a last resort. The protocol rebranded from MakerDAO to Sky in August 2024, introducing USDS as the upgraded stablecoin and SKY as the upgraded governance token, while retaining backwards compatibility with DAI and MKR.
